questions.prompt: Moon Festival is a ____ holiday in Taiwan.
The boy ____ father is a doctor is my classmate.
questions.explain: father 前面要有「誰的」，所以用 whose father。

choices: Both my father and my mother is busy.
Both my father and my mother are busy.
Both my father and my mother was busy.
Both my father and my mother has been busy.
questions.explain: both A and B 一定接複數動詞，所以現在式用 are。

questions.prompt: Would you ____ turning down the music? I’m doing my homework.
questions.explain: Would you mind + V-ing...? 表示「你介意……嗎？」

choices: Although he was hungry, but he didn’t eat.
Although he was hungry, he didn’t eat.
He was hungry, although but he didn’t eat.
Although was he hungry, he didn’t eat.
questions.explain: although 和 but 不能同時並用。

questions.prompt: Good teachers have the ____ to change students’ lives.
questions.explain: 這裡 power 指「影響力、力量」。

choices: Either Amy or I is wrong.
Either Amy or I am wrong.
Either Amy or I are wrong.
Either Amy or I be wrong.
questions.explain: 靠近動詞的是 I，所以要用 am。

choices: Not only you but also he are ready.
Not only you but also he is ready.
Not only you but also he am ready.
Not only you but also he be ready.
questions.explain: 動詞看靠近的主詞 he，所以用 is。

questions.prompt: Mom bought one ____ of cookies for the picnic.
questions.explain: a package of cookies 表示一包餅乾。

choices: The homework was finished last night.
The homework was finish last night.
The homework has finishing last night.
questions.explain: 作業是被完成，所以用 was finished。finish 不是過去分詞。
